item.text: The repository state is already in the post-migration state, so this pass is about carrying the remaining T5 validation through the harness format. I’m checking the checkpoint file and then I’ll write the full task/sense-check snapshot there before returning the authoritative JSON summary.
I confirmed the checkpoint path is writable and absent, so I’m creating it as a full snapshot now. The final JSON I return will match that same all-tasks/all-sense-checks state.

{
  "output": "Implemented the approved plan and captured execution evidence.",
  "files_changed": [
    "src/app/routes.tsx",
    "src/app/App.tsx",
    "src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx",
    "src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useJoinClips.ts",
    "src/app/routes.test.tsx",
    "src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts"
  ],
  "commands_run": [
    "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
    "npx vitest run src/app/routes.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx",
    "npx vitest run src/app/App.router-context-repro.test.tsx",
    "npx vitest run",
    "rg -n \"getRouter|setRouter|@/app/router|createBrowserRouter|RouterProvider|useRouteError|isRouteErrorResponse|errorElement\" src",
    "test -e src/app/router.ts && echo exists || echo deleted"
  ],
  "deviations": [
    "T5 validation completed, but the required full `npx vitest run` is still red at 18 failed files / 35 failed tests from unrelated suites outside this routing migration scope, so the task cannot be closed as fully green without violating the instruction not to fix unrelated issues.",
    "The temporary repro script for the original bug was implemented as `src/app/App.router-context-repro.test.tsx`, run successfully, and deleted immediately after verification so it does not appear in the final diff."
  ],
  "task_updates": [
    {
      "task_id": "T1",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Rewrote `src/app/routes.tsx` from a data-router config to JSX `<Routes>/<Route>` rendering, removed `createBrowserRouter`/`RouterProvider`/`redirect`/`setRouter`, preserved the existing tool `ToolErrorBoundary` and `Suspense` wrappers, removed the no-op `/tools/image-generation` loader, and added `HomeWithAuthRedirect` with the same `normalizeAndPresentError` context, `showToast`, and `logData` handling before returning `<Navigate to='/tools' replace />` when a stored session exists. Wrapped `App` in `BrowserRouter` above `AppProviders` and `AppInternalContent` so `AgentChat` now sits inside router context. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed, and `rg -n \"createBrowserRouter|RouterProvider|redirect\\(|errorElement|setRouter\" src/app/routes.tsx src/app/App.tsx` returned no matches. `npx vitest run src/app/routes.test.tsx` failed only because the existing test still asserted the removed data-router APIs; that follow-up was completed in T4.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/app/routes.tsx",
        "src/app/App.tsx"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "rg -n \"createBrowserRouter|RouterProvider|redirect\\(|errorElement|setRouter\" src/app/routes.tsx src/app/App.tsx",
        "npx vitest run src/app/routes.test.tsx"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T2",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Removed the data-router-only `useRouteError()` / `isRouteErrorResponse` flow from `src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx`, deleted the route-error logging effect and technical-details box, and kept the existing 404 layout plus the `useNavigate()`-driven Return Home button intact. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `nl -ba src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx | sed -n '1,120p'` showed only `useNavigate` remains at lines 1-6 and the 404/navigation UI is still present at lines 24-66. `rg -n \"useRouteError|isRouteErrorResponse|getRouter|setRouter|@/app/router\" src --glob '!**/*.test.*' --glob '!**/__tests__/**'` returned no non-test matches.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run",
        "nl -ba src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx | sed -n '1,120p'",
        "rg -n \"useRouteError|isRouteErrorResponse|getRouter|setRouter|@/app/router\" src --glob '!**/*.test.*' --glob '!**/__tests__/**'"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T3",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Switched `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useJoinClips.ts` from the router singleton to `useNavigate()` and updated `handleGoToJoin` to call `navigate(TOOL_ROUTES.JOIN_CLIPS)` with `navigate` in the callback deps array. Deleted the `src/app/router.ts` singleton file from the workspace. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `nl -ba src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useJoinClips.ts | sed -n '1,140p'` showed `useNavigate` at lines 8-9, `const navigate = useNavigate()` at line 40, and the callback using `navigate(...)` with `[navigate]` deps at lines 98-100. `test -e src/app/router.ts && echo exists || echo deleted` reported `deleted`. `rg -n \"useRouteError|isRouteErrorResponse|getRouter|setRouter|@/app/router\" src --glob '!**/*.test.*' --glob '!**/__tests__/**'` returned no non-test matches after the code change.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useJoinClips.ts",
        "src/app/router.ts"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run",
        "nl -ba src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useJoinClips.ts | sed -n '1,140p'",
        "test -e src/app/router.ts && echo exists || echo deleted",
        "rg -n \"useRouteError|isRouteErrorResponse|getRouter|setRouter|@/app/router\" src --glob '!**/*.test.*' --glob '!**/__tests__/**'"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T4",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Rewrote `src/app/routes.test.tsx` to use the real `react-router-dom` APIs with `MemoryRouter`, mocked route components as test markers, mocked `Layout` to render an `Outlet`, and asserted key route paths render correctly for `/home`, `/`, `/tools/video-editor`, `/payments/success`, and the catch-all route. Updated `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts` to remove the dead `@/app/router` mock and instead mock `useNavigate()` from `react-router-dom` while keeping the export assertion. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `npx vitest run src/app/routes.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts` passed with 2 files / 6 tests green, and both rewritten suites also pass inside the full-suite run.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/app/routes.test.tsx",
        "src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run src/app/routes.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts",
        "npx vitest run",
        "nl -ba src/app/routes.test.tsx | sed -n '1,220p'",
        "nl -ba src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts | sed -n '1,120p'",
        "git status --short src/app/routes.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T5",
      "status": "skipped",
      "executor_notes": "Ran the required validation work instead of accepting the migration on faith: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed; `npx vitest run src/app/routes.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` passed with 3 files / 11 tests green; `rg -n \"getRouter|setRouter|@/app/router|createBrowserRouter|RouterProvider|useRouteError|isRouteErrorResponse|errorElement\" src` returned zero hits; and `src/app/router.ts` remains deleted. A short temporary repro script (`src/app/App.router-context-repro.test.tsx`) mounted `App`, mocked `AgentChat` with `useInRouterContext()`, confirmed the component rendered inside router context, and was deleted after passing. The task is marked skipped rather than done because the required full `npx vitest run` still fails repo-wide at 18 failed files / 35 failed tests from unrelated suites outside this routing migration, and the instructions explicitly forbid scope-creeping into unrelated fixes.",
      "files_changed": [],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run src/app/routes.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx",
        "npx vitest run src/app/App.router-context-repro.test.tsx",
        "npx vitest run",
        "rg -n \"getRouter|setRouter|@/app/router|createBrowserRouter|RouterProvider|useRouteError|isRouteErrorResponse|errorElement\" src",
        "test -e src/app/router.ts && echo exists || echo deleted"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "sense_check_acknowledgments": [
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC1",
      "executor_note": "Verified in `src/app/App.tsx` that `BrowserRouter` is the outermost wrapper around `AppProviders` and `AppInternalContent`, so `AgentChat` remains inside router context as a sibling of `AppRoutes`."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC2",
      "executor_note": "Verified in `src/app/routes.tsx` that `HomeWithAuthRedirect` preserves the full `normalizeAndPresentError` call with context `routes.authRedirect.storageProbe`, `showToast: false`, and `logData` containing `errorCode`, `recoverable`, and `policy`, and that it returns `<Navigate to='/tools' replace />` when `probeStoredSessionToken()` reports a stored session."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC3",
      "executor_note": "Verified in `src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx` that the component no longer imports or calls `useRouteError` / `isRouteErrorResponse`, still renders the 404 UI, and still uses `useNavigate()` for the Return Home button."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC4",
      "executor_note": "Verified that `src/app/router.ts` is deleted from the workspace, `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useJoinClips.ts` now uses `useNavigate()` with `navigate` in the callback deps array, and grep shows no remaining non-test references to `getRouter`, `setRouter`, or `@/app/router` in `src/`."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC5",
      "executor_note": "`npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passes, the grep for `createBrowserRouter`, `RouterProvider`, `useRouteError`, `isRouteErrorResponse`, `errorElement`, `getRouter`, `setRouter`, and `@/app/router` in `src/` returns zero hits, and `src/app/router.ts` remains deleted. The named migrated suites (`src/app/routes.test.tsx`, `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClips.test.ts`, `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx`) all pass. The full `npx vitest run` does not pass cleanly, though; it remains red at 18 failed files / 35 failed tests from unrelated repository failures outside this routing migration."
    }
  ]
}
